ref_text: many little wrinkles gathered between his eyes as he contemplated this and his brow moistened
ref_phon: mɛni lɪɾəl ɹɪŋkəlz ɡæðɚd bᵻtwiːn hɪz aɪz æz hiː kɑːntəmpleɪɾᵻd ðɪs ænd hɪz bɹaʊ mɔɪsənd

ref_text: he could arrange that satisfactorily for Carrie would be glad to wait if necessary
ref_phon: hiː kʊd ɚɹeɪndʒ ðæt sæɾɪsfæktɚɹəli fɔːɹ kæɹi wʊd biː ɡlæd tə weɪt ɪf nɛsᵻsɚɹi

ref_text: his first impulse was to write but four words in reply go to the devil
ref_phon: hɪz fɜːst ɪmpʌls wʌz tə ɹaɪt bʌt foːɹ wɜːdz ɪn ɹᵻplaɪ ɡoʊ tə ðə dɛvəl

ref_text: the long drizzle had begun pedestrians had turned up collars and trousers at the bottom
ref_phon: ðə lɔŋ dɹɪzəl hæd bɪɡʌn pədɛstɹiənz hæd tɜːnd ʌp kɑːlɚz ænd tɹaʊsɚz æt ðə bɑːɾəm

ref_text: then he rang the bell no answer
ref_phon: ðɛn hiː ɹæŋ ðə bɛl noʊ ænsɚ
